THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT BATREZ-LOPEZ, LETICIA ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $88.00, PLTF TO RECOVER NOTHING FROM DEFT.
